creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
[Update: japanese/sj3]

The current japanese/sj3 (sj3-2.0.1.13) has a security bug of sj3serv.
sj3-2.0.1.20 has already been released. In the version one, the bug
was fixed.

You should run:

cd /usr/ports
zcat sj3.patch.gz | patch -p0

where sj3.patch.gz has six new files,

patches/patch-ab
patches/patch-ac
patches/patch-ad
patches/patch-ae
patches/patch-af

each of which was extracted from the original patches/patch-aa
and was changed.
